description_long: This is a high-top Adidas sneaker featuring a combination of brown suede and synthetic materials, accented with bright pink laces and interior lining. The shoe displays the iconic Adidas three stripes in black on the side, with a blue synthetic heel counter and a large pink Adidas Trefoil logo on the back. The midsole is white, providing a clean contrast to the darker upper, while the collar and tongue are padded for comfort. The tongue also features a prominent pink Adidas Trefoil logo patch. The overall design is sporty and urban, suitable for streetwear and casual use.
description: A high-top Adidas sneaker with brown suede, pink laces, blue heel, and prominent Adidas branding. The shoe is sporty, colorful, and designed for urban streetwear.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pink laces, padded tongue with Adidas logo, and brown suede toe box.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the black Adidas stripes, blue heel counter, and pink interior lining.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the blue heel with a large pink Adidas Trefoil logo and padded collar.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the brown suede upper, black stripes, and blue heel, with less visibility of the logo.
attribute_logo: Pink Adidas Trefoil logo on tongue and heel, both on a blue or pink background
